description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The front facade is characterized by a symmetrical arrangement, with two prominent vertical brick columns flanking the central entryway and large, dark-framed windows on both floors. The ground level includes a fenced-in front yard with a small patch of green lawn, while the upper level has a balcony with glass or metal railings. The rear of the house features a spacious terrace with a pergola structure and additional brickwork, providing an outdoor living area. The exterior is predominantly finished in white, with contrasting brick and dark window frames adding visual interest. The overall structure suggests a two-story urban residence designed for contemporary living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, prominent brick columns, and large dark-framed windows. Features include a front balcony, fenced yard, and a rear terrace with a pergola.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, two vertical brick columns, large windows, balcony, and fenced front yard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flat roof, solid white wall, and partial view of the rear terrace with pergola.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the terrace with pergola, brick column, and large windows, as well as the enclosed backyard.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the flat roof, solid white wall, and partial view of the front and rear yards.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with double doors, flanked by vertical brick columns, and a small front porch area with steps and a balcony above.
